tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or early diabetes. Creatinine and potassium are slightly elevated, which may indicate early renal dysfunction. Low total CO₂ could suggest mild metabolic acidosis. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and glycemic control, and clinical correlation for possible underlying causes.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
